/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/llama-lookahead.dir/lookahead.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-lookahead  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/dev/repos/turboquant-cpu/llama.cpp/build/bin: ../../common/libcommon.a ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.3 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.5 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.5 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.5 ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
